claims.claim: We implement a dependency-free prototype consisting of a deterministic swarm simulator and a JSONL-based counterfactual logger, and evaluate it across synthetic workloads of up to 50,000 allocation decisions.

evidence_refs.quote: # Swarm Counterfactual Logger: Compact Decision-Record Logging for Hindsight Scoring of Missed Alternatives in Swarm Task Allocation

claims.claim: The prototype sustains approximately 10,921 logged decisions per second at the 50k-decision scale with a peak resident set size of ~29 MB.

claims.claim: After outcomes are observed, it is often desirable to ask: *what would have happened had a different assignment been chosen?* Answering this question typically requires either full replay of the swarm state or access to an external model that can estimate counterfactual outcomes.
